user_query:
I’m preparing a clinic briefing for our neuromuscular team. Please synthesize the patient cohorts and the local guideline summary provided under input/. Your tasks:

1) Inspect the directory input/patients/ to discover and process all CSV files there (do not hardcode file names). Include a short list of every processed file with its row count in the report.

2) Extract the names of guideline-recommended therapies for each disease from input/guidelines/neuromuscular_guidelines.html. Use the list items under the sections titled "Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS)" and "Myasthenia Gravis (MG)". Treat medication matching as a case-insensitive exact string match against these therapy names.

3) Using all rows from input/patients/*.csv, group data by disease and year and compute the following per group:
   - n_patients
   - mean_age
   - pct_female (share of records with sex == "F")
   - pct_on_respiratory_support (share with resp_support != "None")
   - pct_on_guideline_therapy (share of patients whose medications contain at least one extracted therapy name for their disease)
   - mean_function_score (average of function_score)

4) Deliverables:
   - Save a machine-readable table of the aggregates to output/aggregates.csv with columns exactly in this order: disease, year, n_patients, mean_age, pct_female, pct_on_respiratory_support, pct_on_guideline_therapy, mean_function_score.
   - Create output/clinic_briefing.md that includes: (a) a bullet list of all processed input/patients/*.csv files with their row counts; (b) a short section listing the extracted guideline-recommended therapies per disease; and (c) a concise summary paragraph interpreting the key numbers from output/aggregates.csv.

Use only the files under input/ to compute the numbers. The work should be reproducible if re-run on the same directory. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
